summary: Iteration 43: Complete testing of new features - Loan Management System, POS Role Separation, Employee Portal Loans Tab, Expanded Keyboard Shortcuts. All backend APIs passed (14/14 tests). Frontend UI testing completed successfully.

issues: Console warning about HTML nesting: <tr> cannot be child of <span> - hydration error warning (non-blocking)

seed_data_creation: Test loans created during backend testing for employee Ahmed Khan (TEST_ prefixed), then cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 43 tested new Loan Management features. 3 active loans exist for Ahmed Khan. PIN 1234 maps to employee 'aaaa' with pos_role null (treated as 'both'). Keyboard shortcuts T,L,W,C,K,H,O all working. Employee Portal has Loans tab but admin user has no employee profile linked (shows 'No employee profile linked' message - expected).

backend_apis.GET /api/loans/summary/stats: PASS - Returns total_loans, active_loans, pending_loans, completed_loans, total_disbursed, total_outstanding, total_collected
backend_apis.POST /api/loans: PASS - Creates new loan with pending status
backend_apis.GET /api/loans: PASS - Returns list of all loans
backend_apis.GET /api/loans/{id}: PASS - Returns loan detail with installments array
backend_apis.POST /api/loans/{id}/approve: PASS - Approves loan, changes status to active
backend_apis.GET /api/my/loans: PASS - Returns employee's own loans (returns 404 if no employee profile)
backend_apis.POST /api/cashier/login: PASS - Returns pos_role field in user object

frontend_features.loans_page: PASS - Shows stats cards, tabs (All/Active/Pending/Completed), loan list with progress bars
frontend_features.new_loan_dialog: PASS - Employee select, loan type, amount, installments fields all present
frontend_features.loan_detail_dialog: PASS - Shows loan info, progress bar, payment history, Record Installment button
frontend_features.employee_pos_role: PASS - POS Role dropdown in Add Employee form with 4 options (No POS Access, Cashier Only, Waiter Only, Cashier + Waiter)
frontend_features.cashier_login: PASS - PIN entry and login works, redirects to /cashier/pos
frontend_features.waiter_login: PASS - PIN entry and login works, shows Select Table page with Waiter Mode
frontend_features.keyboard_shortcuts: PASS - All expanded shortcuts present: T(Tables), L(Loans), W(Waiter), C(Cashier), K(Kitchen), H(Employees), O(Order Status)
